name: budstech-sms-location-app
description: Full-stack SMS location sharing application with Node.js, Express, React, and Twilio

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.install-all: npm run install-server && npm run install-client
scripts.test: cd server && npm test && cd ../client && npm test

author: Budstech
